app.name: Lango
hero.title: Learn Speaking in a FUN WAY
hero.subtitle: Practice English speaking with our AI robot. Gamified experience with role-play exercises, immediate grading, and immersive conversational scenarios.
features.title: Why Choose Lango?
features.ai_conversation_desc: Practice with our advanced AI that adapts to your learning pace
features.gamified_learning_desc: Earn points, unlock achievements, and track your progress
features.instant_feedback_desc: Get immediate corrections and suggestions to improve faster
features.awesome_subtitle: Learning with Lango is fun and interactive. Check out what makes our app awesome:
features.speak_robot_desc: Practice English speaking with our AI robot.
features.roleplay_desc: To provide an immersive conversational experience in various scenarios
features.grading_desc: After each exercise user will receive immediate grading
features.improve_desc: A list of poorly pronounced words will be recorded for improvement purpose
features.motivated_desc: Gamified experience to encourage students to participate.
features.progress_desc: Teachers will be able to view progress of all students.
features.gamified_exp_desc: Learning should be fun. Our team of experts blends education with game design to make it engaging.
features.roleplay_immersive_desc: Experience real-life scenarios that help you build the speaking skills you'll actually use.
features.confident_desc: Gain confidence by having successful conversations with our AI — a key step to speaking any new language fluently.
features.speak_ai_subtitle: The best way to learn a language is to actually speak it.
features.speak_ai_desc: Chat with our AI robot for free! With every session, you will feel more confident, positive and uplifted. And soon you will be able to speak fluent English without hesitation.
features.learning_fun: Learning English doesn't have to be boring
features.learning_fun_desc: We provide fun, gamified speaking activities that encourage your English communication skills
features.at_bigben: At the Big Ben in London
pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.reasonable_desc: We collaborate with schools and learning centers to deliver high-quality education. You can get in touch with our representatives for co-operation.
pricing.open_accounts: Open Account for all your students
pricing.custom_background: Customised video background to your organisation
pricing.custom_exercises: Customised exercises to fit your curriculum
